title: postgresql16 security update
overview: An update for Oracle Linux is now available for Oracle Linux 10.
description:
[16.11-1.0.1]
- Replace upstream reference [Orabug: 37044148]

[16.11-1]
- Update to 16.11

[16.10-3]
- Add tmpfiles.d configuration for PostgreSQL 16
- Ensures proper directory permissions for /var/lib/pgsql

[16.10-2]
- Add OpenSSL support to upgrade_configure function
- This ensures upgrade server is compiled with OpenSSL support
- Required for SSL/TLS connections during database upgrades
full_text:
[16.11-1.0.1]
- Replace upstream reference [Orabug: 37044148]

[16.11-1]
- Update to 16.11

[16.10-3]
- Add tmpfiles.d configuration for PostgreSQL 16
- Ensures proper directory permissions for /var/lib/pgsql

[16.10-2]
- Add OpenSSL support to upgrade_configure function
- This ensures upgrade server is compiled with OpenSSL support
- Required for SSL/TLS connections during database upgrades

References:
https://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELSA-2026-0525.html
https://linux.oracle.com/cve/CVE-2025-12818.html
